arts.ttl: CONFIRMED lineups: Real Madrid vs Red Bull Salzsburg, 2025 Champions League
arts.sum: Real Madrid have published their starting lineup for the upcoming match against Red Bull Salzsburg in the UEFA Champions League . It will be interesting to monitor Valverde’s performance on the right side of the defensive line, as Red Bull Salzsburg will surely try to take advantage of his lack of experience in that spot.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid Makes Financial History: A Billion-Euro Powerhouse
arts.sum: According to Football Benchmark’s 2025 European Champions Report, which evaluates the business performance of domestic champions from six major European leagues (Inter, Manchester City, Paris Saint-Germain, PSV Eindhoven, Real Madrid, and Sporting CP), club has set a new standard for financial excellence during the 2023-24 season. Real Madrid has solidified its position as a global leader in football, achieving an extraordinary milestone as the first club to surpass €1 billion in operating revenue.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid vs RB Salzburg LIVE: Possible lineups and latest news
arts.sum: Good evening everybody and welcome to another MARCA in English live blog, this time taking you through the Champions League clash between Real Madrid and RB Salzburg from the Santiago Bernabeu. Two winnable games remain, with Salzburg's struggling form providing a prime opportunity for Real Madrid to assert their dominance.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid star nominated for La Liga Player of the Month
arts.sum: The nominees for the January Player of the Month in La Liga have been unveiled online. And they are headlined by a member of the attacking ranks at Real Madrid,…

arts.ttl: Erling Haaland responds to Real Madrid and Barcelona question after signing new contract
arts.sum: Manchester City forward Erling Haaland has stated that the club ‘feels like home’ following a new 9.5-year deal, which would keep him at the club until 2034. The deal is believed to make him the highest-paid player in European football, but his long-term future is not entirely settled depending on who you speak to. arts.ttl: Champions League | Real Madrid predicted XI to take on RB Salzburg
arts.sum: Real Madrid are set to host Austrian side RB Salzburg this evening at the Bernabéu, as the La Liga leaders look to make a late charge up the league table…

arts.ttl: Kylian Mbappe makes honest admission about Real Madrid start
arts.sum: Kylian Mbappe reflects honestly on his poor start to life at Real Madrid.

arts.ttl: Liverpool plan to sign Real Madrid star to replace Salah
arts.sum: If Mo Salah leaves Liverpool this summer, the Reds plan to sign Rodrygo from Real Madrid as his replacement. Liverpool plan to sign Real Madrid star to replace Salah

arts.ttl: Real Madrid vs Red Bull Salzsburg 2025 live stream: Time, TV channels and how to watch Champions League online
arts.sum: Red Bull Salzsburg will be a tougher team than Las Palmas, though, so Ancelotti’s men have to make sure they play with composure and intensity if they want the three points to pave their way to the next round of the Champions League . Real Madrid host Red Bull Salzsburg in what has the potential to be a crucial, season-defining game for Los Blancos, who still have to clinch their presence in the next round of the European competition.

arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti future: Will legendary Real Madrid boss leave Bernabeu this summer?
arts.sum: Real Madrid head coach Carlo Ancelotti firmly denies suggestions that he could leave Bernabeu at the end of the campaign and is planning to stay until 2029.
